code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let count = list.len(nums)
mut result: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
mut j = 0
while j < count
  match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      cur_max = v
    else if v > cur_max
      cur_max = v
    end
    result = list.push(result, cur_max)
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < count
  match list.get(result, k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
